metadata.description: CLI and agent skills for investigating GitHub PR review comments and executing human-approved closeout plans

plugins.name: resolve-reviews
plugins.description: Uses required structured approval checkpoint, then executes the human-approved fix/reply/resolve/commit/push closeout plan for all PR review comments

plugins.name: resolve-agent-reviews
plugins.description: Uses required structured approval checkpoint, then executes the human-approved fix/reply/resolve/commit/push closeout plan for bot findings

plugins.name: resolve-human-reviews
plugins.description: Uses required structured approval checkpoint, then executes the human-approved fix/reply/resolve/commit/push closeout plan for human review comments
